positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, circular wreath composition featuring intertwining celestial flora and bioluminescent fauna. The main elements include stylized cosmic roots, glowing moonflowers, miniature planetary rings, and delicate, crystalline butterfly wings. The style is ornate line art combined with vintage etching realism, rendered in a limited palette of deep indigo, ethereal sage green, burnished gold, and crisp white. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast, perfect for a centered apparel print. Overhead studio lighting, complex composition, tattoo flash book aesthetic, maximalist yet balanced.
